message:
test(core,app): add comprehensive test coverage for agent selection and debug APIs

This commit adds thorough test coverage for the agent selection and debug query
system introduced in c2c99b7 and 45f644f, validating both core functionality
and the control handle interface. The tests ensure correct behavior across all
selection modes, filtering capabilities, and round-trip conversions.

Core Library Tests (scriptbots-core/src/lib.rs):

1. selection_updates_replace_add_and_clear()
   • Tests all three SelectionMode variants (Replace, Add, Clear)
   • Replace mode: validates that new selection clears previous state
   • Add mode: confirms agents can be added to existing selections
   • Clear mode (empty IDs): verifies all agents are cleared
   • Clear mode (specific IDs): confirms targeted clearing of individual agents
   • Tests AgentId ↔ u64 round-trip conversion via KeyData::from_ffi()
   • Validates selection state transitions between None/Selected/Hovered

2. agent_debug_view_filters_by_selection_and_diet()
   • Tests filtering by SelectionState (only returns Selected agents)
   • Tests filtering by DietClass (Carnivore vs Herbivore based on tendency)
   • Tests filtering by specific agent IDs (positive case)
   • Tests filtering by nonexistent IDs (returns empty vec)
   • Validates AgentDebugSort::EnergyDesc sorting behavior
   • Tests limit parameter to restrict result count
   • Ensures herbivore_tendency correctly maps to DietClass enum

Control Handle Tests (scriptbots-app/src/control.rs):

1. debug_agents_lists_selection()
   • Tests ControlHandle::debug_agents() with compound query
   • Combines selection state filter with specific ID filter
   • Validates that world lock is acquired and released properly
   • Ensures debug query returns correct agent_id in response

2. update_selection_enqueues_and_applies()
   • Tests ControlHandle::update_selection() command queueing
   • Spawns agent, enqueues selection update via control handle
   • Drains command queue to apply pending commands to world
   • Validates that u64 → AgentId conversion works correctly
   • Confirms selection state is applied to agent runtime
   • Tests full round-trip: external API → command queue → world state

Code Quality Improvements:
  • Removed 2 unused `use std::collections::HashSet;` imports
  • Added `DietClass` to servers.rs imports for type availability
  • Added slotmap imports (Key, KeyData) to control tests for ID conversion
  • All tests use explicit agent spawning to avoid test interdependence

Test Design Principles:
  • Each test focuses on a single API surface (selection vs debug query)
  • Tests validate both positive cases (matches) and negative cases (empty results)
  • Selection state transitions are tested exhaustively (None → Selected → None)
  • Round-trip conversions are validated (AgentId ↔ u64 ↔ KeyData)
  • Control handle tests verify both enqueueing and application of commands

Files Changed:
  • crates/scriptbots-core/src/lib.rs (+127 -5): Core selection/debug tests
  • crates/scriptbots-app/src/control.rs (+50): Control handle integration tests
  • crates/scriptbots-app/src/servers.rs (+2 -2): Import formatting

Coverage Impact:
These tests provide comprehensive validation of:
  - SelectionUpdate application logic (all 3 modes)
  - AgentDebugQuery filtering (diet, selection, IDs)
  - AgentDebugQuery sorting and limiting
  - ControlHandle command queueing and application
  - Type conversions between external (u64) and internal (AgentId) representations

This ensures the external agent manipulation API is robust and behaves correctly
across all documented modes and filter combinations.
